zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Brienne於1242年12月25日出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾勞加內時，她的父親Guy de Brienne40歲，母親Eva de Tracy46歲。她於1256年與Nicholas Martin在英國戴文達廷頓結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1279年9月9日在英國英格蘭享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Brienne was born on 25 December 1242, in Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Guy de Brienne, was 40 and her mother, Eva de Tracy, was 46. She married Nicholas Martin in 1256, in Dartington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 9 September 1279, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud Brienne est née le 25 décembre 1242, à Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Guy de Brienne, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eva de Tracy, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Martin en 1256, à Dartington, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 septembre 1279, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud Brienne am 25. Dezember 1242 in Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Brienne 40 und ihre Mutter Eva de Tracy 46. Sie hat 1256 in Dartington, Devon, England Nicholas Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. September 1279 im Alter von 36 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Brienneが1242年12月25日にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアラウアルンで生まれた時，父Guy de Brienneは40歳，母Eva de Tracyは46歳であった。1256年にイギリスデボンダルティントンでNicholas Martinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1279年9月9日にイギリスイギリスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Brienne(이)가 1242년 12월 25일 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 로그하른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Brienne(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva de Tracy(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 데폰 더르틴그턴에서 Nicholas Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Brienne родилась 25 декабря 1242 г. в местности лоарн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Guy de Brienne было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva de Tracy, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Martin в 1256 г. в местности дартингтон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 сентября 1279 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
